segments.name: EV15 Rhine + Mittelbuchen connector
segments.desc: Mittelbuchen -> Mainz (connector) then EuroVelo 15 up the Rhine to its Alpine source at Andermatt
segments.source: Mittelbuchen->Mainz by BRouter; Mainz->Andermatt official EuroVelo 15 GPX

segments.name: EV17 Rhone (ViaRhona)
segments.desc: Andermatt over the Furka to the Rhone glacier, down the Valais and French Rhone to the Mediterranean
segments.source: Official EuroVelo 17 GPX (Andermatt -> Port-Saint-Louis, Lake Geneva south shore)

segments.name: EV8 Mediterranean (bespoke)
segments.desc: Custom Mediterranean route: inland Provence (Manosque->Draguignan), French Riviera to Liguria, the Ligurian coast, over the Passo del Turchino to Piacenza
